de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.sort

Interface Sort

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Named
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSort, ArraySort, GenericSort, NullSort, ProgramSVSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionNonStringObjectSort, ProgramSVSort.SimpleExpressionStringSort, ProxySort, SortImpl

    public interface Sort
extends Named

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static Sort ANY
      Any is a supersort of all sorts.
      static Name CAST_NAME
      Name of getCastSymbol(TermServices).
      static Name EXACT_INSTANCE_NAME
      Name of getExactInstanceofSymbol(TermServices).
      static Sort FORMULA
      Formulas are represented as "terms" of this sort.
      static Name INSTANCE_NAME
      Name of getInstanceofSymbol(TermServices).
      static Sort TERMLABEL
      Term labels are represented as "terms" of this sort.
      static Sort UPDATE
      Updates are represented as "terms" of this sort.

    • Field Detail

      • FORMULA

        static final Sort FORMULA
        Formulas are represented as "terms" of this sort.

      • UPDATE

        static final Sort UPDATE
        Updates are represented as "terms" of this sort.

      • TERMLABEL

        static final Sort TERMLABEL
        Term labels are represented as "terms" of this sort.

      • ANY

        static final Sort ANY
        Any is a supersort of all sorts.

      • CAST_NAME

        static final Name CAST_NAME
        Name of getCastSymbol(TermServices).

      • INSTANCE_NAME

        static final Name INSTANCE_NAME
        Name of getInstanceofSymbol(TermServices).

      • EXACT_INSTANCE_NAME

        static final Name EXACT_INSTANCE_NAME
        Name of getExactInstanceofSymbol(TermServices).

    • Method Detail

      • extendsSorts

        ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts()
        Returns:
        the direct supersorts of this sort. Not supported by NullSort.

      • extendsSorts

        ImmutableSet<Sort> extendsSorts(Services services)
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the direct supersorts of this sort.

      • extendsTrans

        boolean extendsTrans(Sort s)
        Parameters:
        s - some sort.
        Returns:
        whether the given sort is a reflexive, transitive subsort of this sort.

      • isAbstract

        boolean isAbstract()
        Returns:
        whether this sort has no exact elements.

      • getCastSymbol

        SortDependingFunction getCastSymbol(TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the cast symbol of this sort.

      • getInstanceofSymbol

        SortDependingFunction getInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the instanceof symbol of this sort.

      • getExactInstanceofSymbol

        SortDependingFunction getExactInstanceofSymbol(TermServices services)
        Parameters:
        services - services.
        Returns:
        the exactinstanceof symbol of this sort.

      • declarationString

        java.lang.String declarationString()
